title: Fix Gemini API endpoint URL to resolve 404 error

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts to hardcode the correct Gemini Vision API endpoint URL: `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent`. The `buildGeminiUrl(apiKey)` helper must append the API key as a query parameter (`?key=<apiKey>`). Remove any dynamic endpoint construction that could produce malformed URLs missing the API version, model name, or `:generateContent` suffix. Add inline comments documenting the required URL structure.

quotes: Endpoint da API não encontrado (404). Verifique se a URL e o modelo estão configurados corretamente nas Configurações.

acceptanceCriteria: apiConfig.ts hardcodes the base URL as `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent`
The `buildGeminiUrl(apiKey)` function appends the API key as `?key=<apiKey>` query parameter
No dynamic construction can produce a URL missing `v1beta`, the model name, or `:generateContent`
Inline comments document the required URL structure for future maintainers

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to ensure all Gemini API requests are sent using `fetch` with `method: 'POST'`, `Content-Type: application/json`, and a JSON-stringified body of the form `{ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: <prompt> }, { inlineData: { mimeType: <mimeType>, data: <base64Data> } }] }] }`. The image must be base64-encoded with the data URI prefix (e.g., `data:image/jpeg;base64,`) stripped before placement in `inlineData.data`. The `mimeType` field must reflect the actual file MIME type and must never be hardcoded to a fixed value. Remove any remaining multipart/form-data or FormData approach for the Gemini provider.

quotes: O app pode estar usando um endpoint desatualizado (como `v1` em vez de `v1beta`)

acceptanceCriteria: Requests to Gemini use `fetch` with `method: 'POST'` and `Content-Type: application/json`
Request body is JSON-stringified with the `contents[].parts[]` structure containing both the text prompt and the inlineData object
Base64 data URI prefix is stripped before the value is placed in `inlineData.data`
The `mimeType` field is set dynamically from the actual file MIME type
No FormData or multipart/form-data code paths remain for the Gemini provider
A successful image upload no longer returns a 404 error

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx error handling to explicitly detect HTTP 404 responses from the Gemini API and display a clear, actionable Portuguese error message: 'Endpoint da API não encontrado (404). Verifique se a URL e o modelo estão configurados corretamente nas Configurações.' Include a button labeled 'Ir para Configurações' that navigates the user to the Settings page.

quotes: Endpoint da API não encontrado (404). Verifique se a URL e o modelo estão configurados corretamente nas Configurações.

acceptanceCriteria: When a 404 HTTP error is returned from Gemini, the processing animation stops
The error message 'Endpoint da API não encontrado (404). Verifique se a URL e o modelo estão configurados corretamente nas Configurações.' is displayed in Portuguese
A button labeled 'Ir para Configurações' is shown that navigates to the Settings page
Other error types (400, 403, 500) continue to display their existing error messages

constraints: Do not change the backend schema or Motoko actor
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
The Gemini endpoint URL must be exactly: https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent
nonGoals: Changing the AI analysis prompt or logic
Modifying the Results or History page UI
Changing authentication or API key storage logic
